## Source: amazon-inspector (86105842d926ee95e61ae8adf0d4506cbc55c9510189208ee33d511806f2c5ef)
The package expirs was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (d82cf6807fa6c011a17d3f4e8bf8af1e3e935a3d79ab1420356fd87d3f2567de)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'expirs' @ 1.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
